# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Distribute Application

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: write
  packages: write

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Create artifact directory
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/artifacts
          cp -r build/* dist/artifacts/
          cp -r config/* dist/artifacts/
          cp -r scripts/* dist/artifacts/

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/artifacts/
          retention-days: 30

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/artifacts

      - name: Validate artifact integrity
        run: |
          sha256sum dist/artifacts/* | tee dist/artifacts/checksums.txt

      - name: Deploy to internal system
        run: |
          # Use secure deployment method
          curl -X POST ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_ENDPOINT }} \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}" \
            -F "artifact=@dist/artifacts/*" \
            -F "checksums=@dist/artifacts/checksums.txt"
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENDPOINT: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_ENDPOINT }}
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
